positive: A highly stylized and minimalist illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. The composition is centered, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna against a deep indigo and cosmic teal gradient. Main elements include swirling nebula patterns, geometrically shaped oversized leaves, and gentle, glowing celestial creatures (like stylized glowing orbs or gentle unicorns). The art style should be vector illustration meets fine line etching, utilizing strong contrast between luminous cyan/lime green highlights and the deep background. Emphasis on clean silhouettes and flat color fields suitable for screen printing. Magical, ethereal, modern, symmetrical.
